title: Construction General Permit

indexed_extract.summary: Projects disturbing one acre or more, or less than one acre as part of a larger common plan totaling one acre or more, require CGP coverage.
key_points: This is a trigger rule, not a direct fee table.
Use for permit-path warnings, checklist items, and proposal assumptions.
Should generate not-applicable / warning / blocking outputs depending on site-disturbance inputs.

notes: Model as threshold logic with SMARTS workflow hints.
